entryRequirements.visaNote: Most nationalities need an e-Visa or Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) obtained before arrival — India does not offer broad visa-free entry. Apply via the official government e-Visa portal only.
entryRequirements.officialSource: Bureau of Immigration, Government of India (indianvisaonline.gov.in)

transportInfo.paymentCard: Delhi Metro smart card (token also available for single trips)
transportInfo.note: App taxis (Uber/Ola) are generally the safest, most predictable option for tourists over street-hailed vehicles.

majorEventsNote: Diwali and Holi are the two biggest travel-impact festivals — hugely colorful for visitors but also the highest-demand, highest-price periods domestically.
